summary: Iteration 147: Verified reset-and-seed-home-wireframe endpoint fix. The endpoint was failing with 503 DB_ERROR due to UTF-8 to SQL_ASCII encoding conversion issue in the wireframe payload (Turkish characters like İ, Ğ). Applied fix by wrapping payload with _sanitize_payload_for_sql_ascii() function. After fix, endpoint returns 200 OK with ok=true and correctly: deletes demo revisions (19), passivates all old revisions (94), creates new home wireframe pages for TR/DE/FR (3).
critical_code_review_comments: Applied fix: Added _sanitize_payload_for_sql_ascii() wrapper around _build_home_wireframe_payload() in reset_layouts_and_seed_home_wireframe endpoint at line 2876
seed_data_creation: 3 new wireframe home pages created for TR, DE, FR via reset workflow
context_for_next_testing_agent: The reset-and-seed-home-wireframe endpoint now works correctly. It passivates all existing revisions (94) and creates new wireframe home pages for TR/DE/FR with sanitized ASCII-safe content. The active list now contains 3 home pages (TR, DE, FR) and the passive list contains 91 passivated revisions. Public home pages /tr, /de, /fr render the wireframe layout correctly with HEADER, ACIL ILANLAR CTA, KATEGORILER navigation, VITRIN ILANLARI listing grid, and FOOTER sections.

fix_applied.change: Wrapped _build_home_wireframe_payload() with _sanitize_payload_for_sql_ascii() to convert Turkish characters to ASCII
fix_applied.reason: Database has SQL_ASCII encoding while wireframe payload contained UTF-8 Turkish characters (İ, Ğ) causing 'conversion between UTF8 and SQL_ASCII is not supported' error

public_pages_status./tr: 200 OK - renders wireframe with HEADER, ACIL ILANLAR, KATEGORILER, VITRIN ILANLARI, FOOTER
public_pages_status./de: 200 OK - renders wireframe correctly with listings
